action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval=0.642 SR. Current breakdown: DistShift 1.0, LavaGap 1.0, DoorKey 0.98, LavaCrossing 0.92, FourRooms 0.86, KeyCorridor 0.84, UnlockPickup 0.82, LockedRoom/DynObst/MultiRoom 0. Time: 2.4h, 16 iters left. Analysis: Best ROI is to push partially-solved envs higher: FourRooms 0.86→0.95+, KeyCorridor 0.84→0.95+, UnlockPickup 0.82→0.95+, DoorKey 0.98→1.0, LavaCrossing 0.92→1.0. If I gain ~0.10 on each of 4 envs, total SR goes from 0.642 to ~0.682. Strategy: continue training (with resumed model) using lower lr, low entropy on the 4 partially-solved envs. Also, while we're at it, try Dynamic-Obstacles with a fresh seed using ent_coef=0.0 and reward shaping isn't possible — keep it simple. Decision: Run another boost round on FourRooms, KeyCorridor, UnlockPickup, LavaCrossing with longer training and lower lr, then re-eval.
